page_content:
CMLT479 Major Contemporary Authors (3 Credits)

CMLT488 Genres (3 Credits) A study of a recognized literary form, such as tragedy, ﬁlm, satire, literary criticism, comedy, tragicomedy, etc. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

CMLT489 Major Writers (3 Credits) Each semester two major writers from different cultures and languages will be studied. Authors will be chosen on the basis of signiﬁcant relationships of cultural and aesthetic contexts, analogies between their respective works, and the importance of each writer to his literary tradition.
